title: festuca arundinacea subsp. cirtensis
intro: Festuca arundinacea subsp. cirtensis, also known as sweet fescue, is a sub-species of the tall fescue grass that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca arundinacea subsp. cirtensis include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
